name: UTour Group Co., Ltd.
summary: UTour Group Co., Ltd. provides outbound travel agency services in China and internationally. Its outbound travel services include study tours, immigration and real estate, tourism finance, health care travel, etc. The company also provides integrated marketing services. It operates through a network of 120 company-operated retail stores and 2,000 agents. The company was formerly known as Beijing UTour International Travel Service Co., Ltd. and changed its name to UTour Group Co., Ltd. in July 2016. UTour Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
